description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a sprawling, rectangular floor plan and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The exterior walls are primarily white with brown-framed windows and doors, and the roof features a combination of flat and gently sloped sections, including a prominent covered entryway. The house is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several mature trees and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. Large windows and glass doors are visible, especially on the left side, suggesting a sunroom or enclosed patio area. The layout includes multiple rooms branching off a central corridor, with clear separation between living, dining, and private spaces. The overall design is practical and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story house with white walls, brown-framed windows, a mix of flat and sloped roofs, and a landscaped yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, flanked by trees and a driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the backyard area, multiple windows, and a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio on the left side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full width of the house, large windows, and the sunroom structure on the left, with trees lining the rear yard.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the driveway, garage area, and the side yard with additional trees and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a gabled roof, double doors, and flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway
